headline: PAYCHEX INC (NASDAQ:PAYX): A High-Yield Dividend Stock With Strong Profitability but a Stretched Payout Ratio
summary: Paychex (PAYX) offers a 4.94% dividend yield with strong profitability and a 10-year payout history. However, a high 94.97% payout ratio signals caution for income investors seeking sustainable growth.
